summary: Triangulates closed line strips into solid triangle primitives on the GPU. Useful for filling traced contours (Trace POP) or 2D outlines into renderable surfaces.

key_params.name: mode
key_params.note: Convex Only (highly parallel, fast) or Convex and Concave (handles concavities, slower for long strips)

key_params.name: removezeroarea
key_params.note: Discard degenerate triangles with zero area (avoids render artifacts)

key_params.name: uvscale
key_params.note: Scale factor for generated UV coordinates

common_gotchas: Input must be CLOSED line strips. Use the `closed` parameter on the upstream POP (Trace POP, etc.) or close them manually.
Concave mode is much slower than Convex on long strips — start with Convex and only switch up if the silhouette demands it.
Self-intersecting line strips can produce flipped or missing triangles — clean the source contour first.
